LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT TERRY RAMIREZ'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS GRANTED WITH LEAVE TO FILE AN AMENDED COMPLAINT ON OR BEFORE NOVEMBER 8 ALLEGING WHEN PLAINTIFF ALLEGEDLY DISCOVERED THE WRONGFUL CONDUCT AND WHEN DEFENDANT ALLEGEDLY FAILED TO PAY THE MONEY CLAIMED TO BE DUE TO PLAINTIFF. CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-21-2013 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-21-2012 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Nov-07-13 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

Defendant Terry Ramirez Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Oct-21-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Jose Alvarez, Esq., 510-663-6906 for defendant and moving party

No other appearance. Tentative ruling is adopted.
Defendant Terry Ramirez Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is granted with leave to file an amended complaint on or before November 8 alleging when plaintiff allegedly discovered the wrongfrul conduct and when defendant allegedly failed to pay the money claimed to be due to plaintiff. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

Ntc Of Mtn For Judgment On The Pleadings And Req. For Judicial Ntc
Off Calendar Oct-19-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jose J. Alvarez, Esq., Law Office, 510-663-6906, for defendant and moving party
Kelechi Charles Emeziem, Esq., from Emeziem & Ogbu, LLP, for plaintiff and opposing party

Discussed and the Court vacated its tentative ruling. Copies of moving and opposing papers were provided to the court and finding a good cause.
DEFENDANT TERRY RAMIREZ Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is continued to 10/21/11. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077
